certifications.naicsTitle: All Other Specialty Trade Contractors
certifications.businessDescription:
Mission Statement for Equinox Electric:
Equinox Electric is committed to excellence, innovation, and sustainability in the electrical industry. Our mission is to provide top-tier exceptional, electrical solutions with an unwavering commitment to quality, safety, sustainability and environmental responsibility.  Our Vision: Equinox Electric aims to shape a sustainable future through reliable, innovative electrical practices, ultimately contributing to the betterment of society and the environment.  Our Core Values: Excellence: We are committed to excellence when delivering  high-quality services that exceed industry standards.   Safety: We prioritize the safety of our employees, clients, and the community. 
We adhere to the highest safety standards to ensure that all our projects are executed with care and consideration for the well-being of all involved.  Innovation: Equinox Electric seeks innovative solutions to address the needs of our clients, while reducing environmental impact through sustainable practices.  Integrity: We conduct ourselves with unwavering integrity to provide honest, ethical, and fair services, that help foster long-lasting partnerships.  Customer Satisfaction: We believe in clear and open communication. We work closely with our clients to understand their specific needs and our goal is to build long-lasting relationships based on trust and transparency.

certifications.naicsTitle: All Other Specialty Trade Contractors
certifications.businessDescription:
Approved Electric Corporation is an Electrical Contracting Minority Business Enterprise that has been in operation over eighteen years.  Trevor Dunwell Sr. is the original founder and President of the company, with over 39 years of experience in the construction industry.  

Over the years we have transformed our organization to give our clients quality service through innovative concepts.  Where we are now conducting business Approved Electric has recognized steady growth in their business, and has employed key individuals to maintain competitiveness within their industry.  Unlike many of our competitors, we have been able to recognize positive revenue throughout the economic downturn that has plagued many companies and industries alike.

Approved was able to recognize an increase in profits by expanding their clientele base and building on external and internal core competencies.  Approved Electric no longer focuses business strategy on electrical construction for residential and commercial customers.  Through the years Approved has taken advantage of the rise in the telecommunications industry and has begun to offer installation solutions for their clients.  Approved has also expanded themselves to the high voltage industry in an attempt to work for customers such as Consolidated Edison, and PSE&G where they are aggressively seeking electrical contractors.
Approved Electric started out eighteen years ago offering power, heating and lighting solutions for contractors on small scale jobs for under $50,000.  Today we are a company that provides an array of contractors, business owners, developers, city, state and federal organizations, architects & engineers, public utilities, and residential clients with electrical solutions for jobs ranging from $20,000.00 to $2,000,000.00.  

These customers all look toward Approved Electric to fulfill varying needs which includes the following services;
Lighting Systems   Heating Systems  Power Systems  
Security Systems   Fire Alarm Systems  Control Wiring
Bell Systems    Intercom Wiring  Card Access Systems 
Electrical Renovations  Switches & Outlets  Dedicated Computer Lines
Telecommunication Wiring  Emergency Services  High Tower Lighting
Automatic Transfer Switches  Substation Wiring  Closed Circuit Televisions
Public Address Systems  Sound Systems
Through the years we have been able to build an astounding portfolio of clients that includes both public and private agencies such as:
School Construction Authority    Nextel
Dormitory Authority of the State of New York  Joy Construction
City Housing Authority     Kreisler Borg Florman
Metropolitan Transportation Authority   Turner Construction
New York State Office of General Services   AT&T
SG2 Construction Management    Port Authority on NJ/NY


Approved is looking forward to working with reputable clients that can help us grow as an organization in becoming a recognizable mid-size electrical contracting company in the tri-state area.
